name: Tawan Tor Saeng
original_name: ตะวันทอแสง
overview: Rasa is an interior designer at an interior design company in Bangkok. Her boss Petiya receives an assignment from Pakaphong, a well known rich playboy. The assignment is assigned to Rasa, she meets Pakaphong and realises she's met him before.

trailers.title: [Teaser] Tawan Tor Saeng: ตะวันทอแสง 2012
